title: PlayerHeadDrop
description: Minecraft plugin that drops a player's head as loot when killed by another player.
body:
**[⚠️]NOTE!** If u have aby issue with the plugin please report to in our discord!

PlayerHeadDrop: Lightweight Bukkit/Spigot plugin for Minecraft. When a player kills another, the victim's head (with their skin texture) drops as loot. Supports API 1.13+. Enhances PvP with collectible heads!
